creator: kris@FreeBSD.org
text:
Garrett Cooper wrote:

>> Environment:
> FreeBSD optimus 8.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 8.0-CURRENT #0: Mon May 19 02:21:07 PDT 2008     root@optimus:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/OPTIMUS  i386
>> Description:
> [gcooper@optimus /devel/ncvs/src]$ make cleandir cleanincludes clean 
> # ...
> ===> lib/libdwarf (cleandir)
> [gcooper@optimus /devel/ncvs]$ ls src/lib/libdwarf
> cd: can't cd to /devel/ncvs/src/lib/libdwarf
>> How-To-Repeat:
> CVSROOT='anoncvs@anoncvs1.FreeBSD.org:/home/ncvs' cvs up
>> Fix:
> Fix CVS repo / resync (FYI to jb / CVS admins). Directory exists in cvsweb, not in cvs(1).

pointyhat# env CVSROOT='anoncvs@anoncvs1.FreeBSD.org:/home/ncvs' cvs get 
src/lib/libdwarf
The authenticity of host 'anoncvs1.freebsd.org (216.87.78.137)' can't be 
established.
DSA key fingerprint is 53:1f:15:a3:72:5c:43:f6:44:0e:6a:e9:bb:f8:01:62.
Are you sure you want to continue connecting (yes/no)? yes
Warning: Permanently added 'anoncvs1.freebsd.org' (DSA) to the list of 
known hosts.
U src/lib/libdwarf/Makefile
U src/lib/libdwarf/_libdwarf.h
U src/lib/libdwarf/dwarf.h
U src/lib/libdwarf/dwarf_abbrev.c
U src/lib/libdwarf/dwarf_attr.c
U src/lib/libdwarf/dwarf_attrval.c
U src/lib/libdwarf/dwarf_cu.c
U src/lib/libdwarf/dwarf_dealloc.c
U src/lib/libdwarf/dwarf_die.c
U src/lib/libdwarf/dwarf_dump.c
U src/lib/libdwarf/dwarf_errmsg.c
U src/lib/libdwarf/dwarf_errno.c
U src/lib/libdwarf/dwarf_finish.c
U src/lib/libdwarf/dwarf_form.c
U src/lib/libdwarf/dwarf_init.c
U src/lib/libdwarf/dwarf_loc.c
U src/lib/libdwarf/libdwarf.h

Seems to be present as expected.  I guess you're not using cvs 
correctly: update -Pd is basically mandatory (prune empty directories, 
and create new directories that don't exist locally), and -A is also 
necessary if you have a sticky tag set in your tree (e.g. RELENG_7, or a 
date) and you want to update to HEAD.

> Attached file isn't a patch ; it's an output log.
> 
> You appear to have pasted in binary garbage?

Kris
